title: inula helvetica var. brevifolia
intro: Inula helvetica var. brevifolia is a plant species, also known as a variant of Inula helvetica, within the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. Inula helvetica var. brevifolia is reported to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including the reduction of inflammation and improvement of cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically used to support digestive and respiratory health.
